category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Zimbabwe) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Zimbabwe Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入津巴布韦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入辛巴威：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Zimbabwe market-access expectations: SAZ (Standards Association of Zimbabwe) ZWS standards adopting IEC 62133, conformity/import inspection where in scope, POTRAZ radio type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer requirement. Zimbabwe is landlocked, so goods typically route via Durban (South Africa) or Beira (Mozambique).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与津巴布韦市场准入对照：SAZ（津巴布韦标准协会）发布并采纳IEC 62133的ZWS标准、适用范围内的合格评定/进口检验、含无线功能产品的POTRAZ无线电型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及境内进口商要求。津巴布韦为内陆国，货物通常经德班（南非）或贝拉（莫桑比克）转运。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與辛巴威市場准入對照：SAZ（辛巴威標準協會）發布並採納IEC 62133的ZWS標準、適用範圍內的合格評定/進口檢驗、含無線功能產品的POTRAZ無線電型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及境內進口商要求。辛巴威為內陸國，貨物通常經德班（南非）或貝拉（莫三比克）轉運。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Zimbabwe should align cell safety to IEC 62133 (often adopted as a ZWS standard via SAZ, frequently through SANS), satisfy any SAZ import conformity/inspection requirement where the product is in scope, obtain POTRAZ type approval for any wireless function, hold a valid UN 38.3 transport report, and work through an in-country importer. Zimbabwe does not operate an EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or EPR regime, and Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification is not automatically recognised for Zimbabwe market access.
answer_first.zh: 面向津巴布韦的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，应使电芯安全对标IEC 62133（通常由SAZ采纳为ZWS标准，常经SANS转采）、在产品属适用范围时满足SAZ进口合格评定/检验要求、为任何无线功能取得POTRAZ型号核准、持有有效的UN 38.3运输报告，并通过境内进口商开展业务。津巴布韦没有欧盟式的横向电池、RoHS或EPR制度，中国GB 31241或CCC认证在津巴布韦市场准入中不被自动认可。
answer_first.zht: 面向辛巴威的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，應使電芯安全對標IEC 62133（通常由SAZ採納為ZWS標準，常經SANS轉採）、在產品屬適用範圍時滿足SAZ進口合格評定/檢驗要求、為任何無線功能取得POTRAZ型號核准、持有有效的UN 38.3運輸報告，並通過境內進口商開展業務。辛巴威沒有歐盟式的橫向電池、RoHS或EPR制度，中國GB 31241或CCC認證在辛巴威市場准入中不被自動認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (SAZ, POTRAZ, UNECE, IEC) preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
